title: Golden Globes Final Predictions: One Battle After Another Expected to Dominate
text: According to Variety's awards predictions, Paul Thomas Anderson is projected to win Best Director for 'One Battle After Another' at the 83rd Golden Globes ceremony. The article notes that Anderson's potential victory would be significant because 'One Battle After Another' is also favored to win Best Picture in the Musical or Comedy category. The piece explains that 'The Globes have historically been friendlier to auteurist studio plays in this category, and One Battle fits that mold neatly.' Could Win alternatives are Jafar Panahi and Ryan Coogler. The article also mentions a rare possibility: if Anderson wins both Director and Screenplay, he would complete 'a rare hat trick to accompany projected directing and best picture wins.' Only Oliver Stone previously achieved this feat at the Golden Globes for 'Born on the Fourth of July' in 1989.
